name: Nude Elf Village of Love
description:
>>>>> Update! Check out my new Edging Girlfriend bot! (click the green words, fixed now) <<<<<


Sandbox bot. A nude elf village accepts you into their loving embrace. They bring you into their homes, share you freely with each other without jealously, and show you how tender and caring (and sexually depraved) elves can be.

On the initial message, you can just follow the path. There is an initial start programmed into the scenario where you can help an elf woman in distress to naturally get yourself invited to the village.

After that, the scenario cycles between alternating themes:
1. Setting up or building up a sexual encounter or situation of some kind.

2. After sex, there's a period of wholesome time spent together where you can get to know the woman and the village more.

The bot works great with Deepseek 3.2 proxy.

Please read! --->>> If you enjoyed this, please consider donating some money, as my financial situation is quite dire right now, and I only have small number of Thank you to those who have donated so far. You have helped me pay my credit card bill on time. So if giving a bit wouldn't be too burdensome to you, I would be grateful for anything you can give. The tip link is:

https://ko-fi.com/timofmars

I program bots unlike anyone else, so if you try my bots, take notice of how the behaviors and the way things play out are probably not what you'd normally expect to see from the AI by default. I don't give a vague personality for the bot to interpret. I teach it specifically how things should develop, the special distinct behaviors characters act out, and the things the narration should focus on to create just the right setup to create the types of situations I'm looking for.

But I wonder if it's just me that loves my own bots, and maybe other people just see them as yet another bot, nothing special. So if you really do find it to be a bit special, let me know, and that'll make it worth it for me to work on more. I have ideas for more one-of-kind bots too. (My current idea is a one involving constant edging / orgasm-denial in public, like while on a date with a girlfriend.

I'd also consider doing bots on commission if anyone has an idea for something they want and is interested. Leave a comment and I'll give you a way to contact me.
creator: timofmars
